creator: brix@FreeBSD.org
text:
The existing xapian-related ports are currently stuck at version 1.0.x, while version 1.2.x is the latest stable version.

A similar repocopy was done once before (see ports/151093), but was not picked up by the originator due to the mess surrounding the xapian* ports at that time.

Luckily, Jean-Francois Dockes <jf@dockes.org> has stepped up to maintain all four xapian 1.2.x and I have volunteered to maintain the xapian*10 ports, so let's try this repocopy one more time.

Fix: 

Please repocopy the following ports:

databases/xapian-core => databases/xapian-core10
databases/xapian-bindings => databases/xapian-bindings10
databases/p5-Search-Xapian => databases/p5-Search-Xapian10
www/xapian-omega => www/xapian-omega10
